Title: r3d_scroll2top Plugin 5.3.8
Description:
Joomla System Plugin: R3D Scroll To Top Button

Version: 5.3.8
Features:
- Plugin artifact for Joomla
- Download and metadata managed centrally
- Ready for automated update delivery
Changelog:
Version 5.3.8
- Release-Uptick fuer Live-Publish auf `extensions.r3d.de`.
- Beibehaltung der neuen Hover-Icon-Einstellungen sowie Joomla-Update-Feed-Anbindung.

Full changelog: https://github.com/r3dvorak/r3d_scroll2top/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
Notes:
Automatically published via the R3D build/release routine.
Compatible with Joomla 4.4 through 6+.
For questions: dev@r3d.de
